
# Supporting and Contributing {.unnumbered .unlisted}

If you like this book or find it useful, please consider supporting it by:

- [Buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/twaclaw)^[https://buymeacoffee.com/twaclaw] $\text{[hot_beverage:1.5em:-0.3em]{.twemoji}}$ (or two, three, five, seven, etc.) 
- Giving a star $\text{[star:1.5em:-0.3em]{.twemoji}}$ and contributing on  [GitHub](https://github.com/twaclaw/yo-yo-math)^[https://github.com/twaclaw/yo-yo-math].
- Sharing with others $\text{[love_letter:1.5em:-0.3em]{.twemoji}}$.
